description: Case style: Analog watch with a quadrilateral stainless steel case for enhanced durability Dial style: Black and blue dial with black hands Strap style: Stainless steel strap with a butterfly clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 12 hour and 6 hour mark on the dial Date aperture on the 6 hour mark on the dial Screw to reset time Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to wear it out in the rain and swimming Warranty: 2 years (1 year for digital and ana-digital watches)
